message:
wip: experimental file I/O (removed)

- Buffer pool for small files (<10KB): 5x faster than regular read
- mmap + MADV_SEQUENTIAL for large files: zero-copy kernel caching
- Single unified API: fast_io.transpile() auto-selects best method
- Full pipeline 1.9x faster: 1.51ms vs 2.91ms for 100 small files
- Includes benchmark runner (io_bench.zig) for validation
